title: Chinese practice todo with shark-circle dream and horizontal/vertical people frame
html:
TL;DR

  • October 2019 todo-dump from 17-year-old Yahir mixing SAT prep, internship, "Going to study abroad" declarative, and a "philosophical vape dilemma in the future?" — the shanghai study abroad arc visible five years before it lands.
  • "Goals, and achieving them, Cameron Lewis, setting small goals" — cameron lewis explicitly framed as Yahir's goal-setting peer model in this period.
  • "Talking to Alexandria?? How should I talk to Alexandria" — recursive girl-question loop continues from 2019 07 28 alexandrias drawing of a person or almost a silhouette on a and 2019 09 10 low key writing this to end; alexandria nagy is still the focal disturbance.
  • "Talking with Travis and Sr. Manuel" — travis (likely boys and girls club-orbit mentor) plus a Spanish-teacher contact, suggesting the bilingual confidant pattern.
  • Two cryptic title-spec phrases sit at the bottom: "Circle dream like a shark" and "Horizontal and Vertical people position" — both read like note as letter to self glyphs, framings he'd come back to.

Key quotes

"Going to study abroad"

"philosophical vape dilemma in the future?"

"Circle dream like a shark"

"Horizontal and Vertical people position"

Why it matters in the graph

  • The "Going to study abroad" line in October 2019 is the earliest declarative form of what becomes shanghai study abroad in 2024 — five-year manifestation pattern, same shape as the Egypt-bucket-list → Egypt-trip pipeline noted in grants pass teen era.
  • "Cameron Lewis, setting small goals" — third recurrence of cameron lewis across the 2019 corpus, confirming peer-as-mentor pattern.
  • "Horizontal and Vertical people position" is structurally identical to the type effectiveness chart / matrix-thinking instinct catalogued in normal neutral to everything — Yahir is reaching for two-axis frames to classify people, age 17.
  • "E-commerce route with the buds" — recurring buds/FBA hustle thread also in 2019 08 18 contact yebw people.

Open questions

  • What was the "philosophical vape dilemma"? — vape-era 2019, but worth knowing if this turned into a written argument.
  • "Circle dream like a shark" — was this a literal dream he had, or a self-description?
  • "Horizontal and Vertical people position" — did this framing ever get developed? Worth scanning later notes for resurgence.

Wikilinks

cameron lewis · alexandria nagy · travis · shanghai study abroad · china chapter · fbla · grants pass teen era · normal neutral to everything · 2019 07 28 alexandrias drawing of a person or almost a silhouette on a
